summary: WIN-004 c4 H3 unsourced 'westward-drift advection in broader MHD models' claim now cites Aubert 2015 GJI 203 and Wardinski & Holme 2011 GJI 187 as representative geodynamo simulations, with language softened from 'consistent with' to 'qualitatively consistent with' and disclaimer tightened to 'this citation or any single one of those simulations.' Citation depth matches existing 'Terra-Nova et al. (2017)' bare-name format in the same WIN-004 detail_evidence. Patch PATCH-304-D in EXP-304.
